incident_timeline.what_happened: My name is Kumar. I operate a sizable hardware establishment in Jaffna. For the preceding five years, an individual identified as Rajan was employed as an accountant at my establishment. He was exclusively responsible for managing all financial accounts pertaining to the store's revenue and expenditure, as well as all banking transactions. During the annual audit of our establishment conducted last month, a significant financial irregularity was uncovered in the accounts.

prosecution_logic: Evidence supports prosecution case based on available facts
defense_logic: Defense presents counter-arguments based on available evidence
reasonable_doubt_factors: Factors creating reasonable doubt based on defense arguments

analyzed_case_file.final_judicial_opinion: The case requires careful evaluation of all evidence, witness credibility, and legal precedents. Both prosecution and defense present compelling arguments that must be weighed by the court.
